title: Forty-six new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta April 23-25
summary: On April 23, YKHC reports thirty-seven new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. New COVID-19 Cases The 37 are residents in: Akiak (1) Aniak (1) Bethel (5) Emmonak (2) Newtok (1) Nunapitchuk (4) St. Marys (1) Toksook Bay (19) Tuntutuliak (3) — On April 24, YKHC reports three new cases of COVID-19 in th...

title: NANA Board to Take Shareholder Questions & Comments During April Board Meeting
summary: The NANA board invites all shareholders to join the NANA board meeting on Wednesday, April 27, at 9:15 a.m. AKDT to provide questions and comments. Shareholders can access the dial-in number and passcode via the shareholder portal, nanatkut.com. There is also a call-in number for shareholders who wa...
